success_criteria: gemini CLI is detected and version is recorded.
run-validator-b live execution is attempted with a fresh Validator-B handoff.
Validator-B result artifact is produced and parses as Validator-B / Gemini CLI result, or a Resource Failure is recorded with clear cause.
known_risks: Gemini CLI may require authentication, quota, or sandbox support that is unavailable in this local environment.
Live stdout envelope, prompt transport, or read-only mode may differ from parser assumptions.
forbidden_context: Do not include another validator result artifact.
Do not include secrets, credentials, API keys, tokens, or PII.
Do not ask Validator-B to modify files or merge branches.
